hero.subtitle: Meetropolis isn't another meeting tool. It's the place where your team is together all day — with spatial audio, spontaneous hallway chats, and a world that reflects your culture.
hero.urgency: Set up today — your team is in tomorrow.

problem.title: Remote work often feels lonely.
problem.subtitle: Endless video calls. No spontaneous exchange. Team culture eroding with every new hire — until onboarding takes longer and good people quietly leave.
problem.card1Text: Your team sits isolated in front of screens. No hallway chat, no quick shout-out — just silence between meetings.
problem.card2Text: A video call for every little thing. The grid layout is exhausting, spontaneous alignment is impossible.
problem.card3Text: Chat here, video there, presence nowhere. Your team juggles too many tools — and loses track.

solution.title: Meetropolis puts an end to that.
solution.text: A virtual place where your team comes together — naturally. Walk through your office as an avatar, bump into colleagues in the hallway, and start a conversation on the spot. Like a real office, only better.

comparison.title: You already have tools for calls and chat. Meetropolis is what's missing in between.
comparison.subtitle: Three tool categories for modern teams — and where Meetropolis fits in.
comparison.card2Gap1: No visual presence in the team
comparison.card3Subtitle: A virtual place for daily collaboration
comparison.card3Strength2: Spontaneous encounters like in an office

pricing.title: More affordable than the alternatives. No compromises.
pricing.subtitle: Enterprise features at a fair price. Transparent and predictable.

social.title: Early teams, honest voices.
social.subtitle: Meetropolis is new — and we're upfront about it. What we don't have: ten thousand customers. What we do have: pilot teams using it daily, and a setup that delivers what it promises.
social.quotesSubtitle: Anonymised at the request of our Founders customers. Real quotes, no PR fluff.
social.quote1Text: We shrank our daily standup to 10 minutes because most things had already been clarified at the virtual desk. That was the moment I understood what spatial audio actually changes.
social.quote2Text: Day one of onboarding: new person gets an avatar and just walks through the rooms. Three days later, they know half the team by name. Before, that took three weeks.
social.quote3Text: What surprised us: we don't start the day with Slack anymore — we walk through the virtual office. The vibe is instant, and you can't generate that in Slack, no matter how many emojis.
social.pillarsSubtitle: Three promises we deliver to our first teams.
social.pillar1Text: No support bot. You talk to the founders. Feature requests hit the backlog same day.
social.pillar2Text: Early adopters keep their entry price. Even if we raise prices later, your plan is locked in.
social.pillar3Text: Servers in Germany, exportable anytime, self-hosting later. A real alternative, not a lock-in.

cta.title: Ready to open your virtual office?
cta.subtitle: Start your free 14-day trial. No credit card, no risk, no auto-renewal.
cta.honest: Honest: if your team is under 5 people and sees each other live every day, you probably don't need us.

consent.title: We use Meta Pixel
consent.description: We use Meta Pixel to improve our offering and show you relevant ads. Your consent is voluntary and you can revoke it any time via the “Cookie Settings” link in the footer.

billing.successText: Your payment has been processed. You will be redirected shortly...
billing.cancelText: The payment was cancelled. You can try again at any time.

commonLanding.landing.hero.titleLine2: But does it still feel like a team?
commonLanding.landing.hero.subtitle: Meetropolis gives distributed teams what video calls can't: spontaneous conversations, real presence, and the feeling of being together in one place.
commonLanding.landing.problem.title: Remote work has a dark side.
commonLanding.landing.problem.meetingFatigueDesc: Every conversation needs a calendar invite, a link, an invitation. Spontaneity? Forget it.
commonLanding.landing.problem.invisibleColleaguesDesc: Who's available right now? Who can be approached? Nobody knows — until you check their status.
commonLanding.landing.problem.teamCultureDesc: New hires can't connect. Virtual coffee breaks just don't work.
commonLanding.landing.problem.toolChaosDesc: Slack, Zoom, Teams, Google Meet — a different tool for every occasion. None replaces real proximity.
commonLanding.landing.problem.closing: Every week without a solution costs not just productivity — it costs cohesion, innovation, and good employees.
commonLanding.landing.solution.title: Imagine...
commonLanding.landing.solution.item1: You walk over to a colleague and ask a quick question — no meeting link needed.
commonLanding.landing.solution.item2: New hires are greeted at reception and instantly find their place.
commonLanding.landing.solution.item3: Your team sees at a glance who's available and who doesn't want to be disturbed.
commonLanding.landing.solution.item4: The office feeling is back — without commuting, without open-plan noise.
commonLanding.landing.solution.closing: That's exactly what Meetropolis makes possible. Starting today.
commonLanding.landing.usps.title: 4 reasons teams switch to Meetropolis.
commonLanding.landing.usps.dataInGermanyDesc: Hosted in Germany, GDPR compliant. No US cloud provider in the background. Your data belongs to you.
commonLanding.landing.usps.noItProjectDesc: Sign up, invite your team, get started. Ready in 5 minutes. No Docker, no DevOps.
commonLanding.landing.usps.desktopAppDesc: Always reachable, no browser tab needed. Floating mini window for microphone, camera, and status.
commonLanding.landing.usps.allInOneDesc: Map editor, communication, management, marketplace — no patchwork of third-party tools.
commonLanding.landing.features.title: Everything your virtual office needs.
commonLanding.landing.features.spatialAudioDesc: Get closer = hear. Walk away = silence. Just like a real office.
commonLanding.landing.features.hdVideoDesc: Crystal-clear quality. One click for screen sharing.
commonLanding.landing.features.mapEditorDesc: Design your office yourself. Rooms, furniture, zones — right in the browser.
commonLanding.landing.features.privateZonesDesc: Meeting rooms with soundproofing and optional capacity limits.
commonLanding.landing.features.virtualAssistantsDesc: Reception bots, info stations, automatic announcements.
commonLanding.landing.features.teamOverviewDesc: Who's online? One click — instantly with your colleague.
commonLanding.landing.features.marketplaceDesc: Furniture, avatars, themes. Your office grows with you.
commonLanding.landing.features.remoteControlDesc: Microphone, camera, status controllable via API (Stream Deck, calendar).
commonLanding.landing.comparison.title: Meetropolis vs. alternatives
commonLanding.landing.socialProof.title: Teams trust Meetropolis
commonLanding.landing.socialProof.testimonial1: Since we started using Meetropolis, remote work no longer feels lonely. The spontaneous conversations are worth their weight in gold.
commonLanding.landing.socialProof.testimonial2: We tried Gather, WorkAdventure, and Teams. Meetropolis was the only tool where privacy wasn't a compromise.
commonLanding.landing.socialProof.testimonial3: Our onboarding time has been cut in half. New hires immediately find their place through the virtual office.
commonLanding.landing.pricing.title: Transparent. Fair. No surprises.
commonLanding.landing.pricing.trialNote: 14-day free trial. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
commonLanding.landing.riskReversal.title: No risk. Guaranteed.
commonLanding.landing.riskReversal.noCreditCard: No credit card to get started
commonLanding.landing.riskReversal.dataExport: Data export guaranteed — your data belongs to you
commonLanding.landing.riskReversal.germanSupport: German support — real people, no chatbots
commonLanding.landing.download.title: Meetropolis for desktop
commonLanding.landing.download.subtitle: Everything the browser can do — plus mini mode, system notifications, and auto-updates.
commonLanding.landing.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
commonLanding.landing.faq.a1: Only those currently online. 10 team members but only 5 online at the same time? Then capacity for 5 is enough.
commonLanding.landing.faq.q2: Do I need IT resources for setup?
commonLanding.landing.faq.a2: No. Sign up, invite your team, done. No server, no Docker, no DevOps.
commonLanding.landing.faq.a3: In Germany. GDPR compliant, with data export and account deletion at the push of a button.
commonLanding.landing.faq.q4: Can I change plans at any time?
commonLanding.landing.faq.a4: Yes, upgrading and downgrading is possible at any time. Pro-rated billing on upgrade.
commonLanding.landing.faq.a5: All paid plans include a 14-day free trial. The Free plan is free forever.
commonLanding.landing.faq.a6: Enterprise quality powered by LiveKit (WebRTC). HD video, spatial audio, automatic noise cancellation.
commonLanding.landing.faq.a7: Your data is retained for 30 days. Export is available anytime. No cancellation period.
commonLanding.landing.faq.q8: Do I need the desktop app?
commonLanding.landing.faq.a8: No, Meetropolis works fully in the browser. The desktop app additionally offers a mini mode (always-on-top window), native notifications, and automatic updates.
commonLanding.landing.finalCta.title: Your virtual office awaits.
commonLanding.landing.finalCta.subtitle: Get started in 5 minutes. Free. No risk.
commonLanding.landing.finalCta.demoText: or write to us for a demo:
commonLanding.landing.finalCta.ps: P.S. Start today — before your best people get fed up with the next “Is everyone on the call?” meeting.
commonLanding.landing.footer.tagline: The virtual office for remote teams.
